stories.title: USD/INR surges as Iran vows retaliation against Trump’s 48-hour ultimatum
stories.summary: The Indian Rupee (INR) extends its downfall against the US Dollar (USD) at the start of the holiday-shortened week. Indian markets will remain closed on Thursday due to Shri Ram Navami.

stories.title: EUR/GBP steadies near 0.8650 as traders adopt caution on Middle East conflict
stories.summary: EUR/GBP pares its daily losses and is hovering around 0.8670 during the Asian hours on Monday. The currency cross opened at a gap down as the Euro (EUR) faces struggles amid increased safe-haven demand due to increasing Middle East tensions.

stories.title: EUR/USD falls to near 1.1540 as US Dollar remains firm amid Middle East conflicts
stories.summary: The EUR/USD pair is down 0.2% to near 1.1545 during the late Asian trading session on Monday. The major currency pair is under pressure as the US Dollar (USD) gains amid an increase in demand for safe-haven assets due to escalating conflicts in the Middle East.

stories.title: Gold nears YTD low; seems vulnerable as hawkish central banks counter geopolitical risks
stories.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) adds to its recent heavy losses registered over the past three weeks or so and attracts some follow-through selling for the fourth consecutive day on Monday.

stories.title: USD/CHF gathers strength to near 0.7990 on Fed hawkish tone
stories.summary: The USD/CHF pair gathers strength to near 0.7890 during the early European session on Monday. A hawkish hold from the US Federal Reserve (Fed) provides some support to the US Dollar (USD) against the Swiss Franc (CHF). Traders will closely monitor the situation in the Middle East

stories.title: GBP/JPY struggles to capitalize on modest intraday uptick, flat lines below mid-212.00s
stories.summary: The GBP/JPY cross attracts some dip-buyers near the 211.85 region during the Asian session on Monday, though it lacks follow-through and remains confined in a range held over the past week or so.

stories.title: India Gold price today: Gold falls, according to FXStreet data
stories.summary: Gold prices fell in India on Monday, according to data compiled by FXStreet.

stories.title: Silver Price Forecast: XAG/USD holds losses near $65.50 amid Fed hawkish outlook
stories.summary: Silver price (XAG/USD) extends its losing streak for the fifth successive session, trading around $65.60 per troy ounce during the Asian hours on Monday.

stories.title: NZD/USD Price Forecast: Bears dominate below 200-SMA barrier near 0.5865-0.5870
stories.summary: The NZD/USD pair attracts sellers for the second straight day and slides back closer to the 0.5800 mark during the Asian session on Monday. Moreover, the broader fundamental backdrop and technical setup suggest that the path of least resistance for spot prices remains to the down

stories.title: US Dollar Index edges higher above 99.50 on Middle East tensions, hawkish Fed
stories.summary: The US Dollar Index (DXY), an index of the value of the US Dollar (USD) measured against a basket of six world currencies, currently trades near 99.65 during the early European trading hours on Monday.

stories.title: USD/CAD Price Forecast: Tests 1.3700 support near moving averages
stories.summary: USD/CAD continues to lose ground for the second successive session, trading around 1.3710 during the Asian hours on Monday.

stories.title: Asian stock markets face bloodbath as Iran threatens indefinite Hormuz closure
stories.summary: Stock markets in the Asian region have fallen like a house of cards at the start of the week as escalating conflicts in the Middle East, following United States (US) President Donald Trump’s ultimatum to Iran for reopening the Strait of Hormuz has further prompted energy supply c

stories.title: Israel launches new wave of ‘extensive strikes’ on Tehran
stories.summary: The Israel Defense Forces (IDF), the nation’s military, said in a social media post on Monday that it has begun a wide-scale wave of “extensive strikes” targeting Iranian infrastructure in Tehran.

stories.title: WTI hovers around 98.00 due to persistent Middle East supply concerns
stories.summary: West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude eases from intraday highs but remains elevated near $98.10 per barrel during Monday’s Asian session, supported by persistent Middle East supply concerns.

stories.title: Saudi Aramco cuts Asia oil supply for second month in April — Reuters
stories.summary: Saudi Aramco, the world's top oil exporter, cut crude supply to Asian buyers for a second month ‌in April after the US-Israeli war with Iran disrupted trade via the Strait of Hormuz, Reuters reported on Monday.

stories.title: Japanese Yen sticks to modest losses; USD/JPY looks to build on strength beyond 159.50
stories.summary: The USD/JPY pair attracts some follow-through buying for the second straight day and climbs to mid-159.00s during the Asian session on Monday. Spot prices remain close to the highest level since July 2024, touched last week, though intervention fears might cap further gains.

stories.title: GBP/USD Price Forecast: Declines below 1.3350 as bearish momentum builds amid stronger USD
stories.summary: The GBP/USD pair holds losses near 1.3335 during the Asian trading hours on Monday, pressured by a stronger US Dollar (USD). Escalating conflict in the Middle East pushed Brent crude oil prices above $100 per barrel.

stories.title: EUR/CAD struggles near 1.5850 as oil prices support Canadian Dollar
stories.summary: EUR/CAD rebounds after opening with a gap lower, trading near 1.5830 during the Asian session on Monday.

stories.title: IEA Chief Birol: Situation in Middle East is severe
stories.summary: The International Energy Agency (IEA) Chief Fatih Birol said on Monday that he is discussing with governments across globe, if necessary there will be more releases of oil stocks.

stories.title: AUD/USD Price Forecast: Bears have the upper hand near 0.7000; 200-EMA breakdown in play
stories.summary: The AUD/USD pair opened with a modest bearish gap on Monday and touched a one-week low during the Asian session, though it lacked follow-through selling. Spot prices currently trade around the 0.7000 psychological mark, down 0.25% for the day,

stories.title: Hong Kong’s Boyaa Interactive eyes $70M crypto treasury expansion
stories.summary: Boyaa Interactive International is the 23rd-largest Bitcoin treasury and the third-largest in Asia, behind Japan’s Metaplanet and China’s Next Technology Holding.

stories.title: Mark Zuckerberg is conjuring a CEO AI agent to help him run Meta
stories.summary: The Meta co-founder is reportedly working on a personal AI agent to bypass management layers as Meta pushes employees to adopt agentic tools.

stories.title: Crypto, stocks fall as oil chops after Iran vows response to Trump threat
stories.summary: Bitcoin and Asian markets dropped on Monday as Iran escalated threats to strike critical infrastructure in the Gulf.

stories.title: Agentic AI commerce may spell the end of internet ads: a16z Crypto
stories.summary: “The internet is civilization’s town square, and the economic contract is now obsolete,” wrote Sam Ragsdale on an a16z Crypto blog on Sunday.

stories.title: Michael Saylor signals BTC buy as Strategy's stack slips 10% into the red
stories.summary: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin-holding company Strategy has already purchased more than $2.9 billion worth of the cryptocurrency this month.

stories.title: NYSE exchanges scrap crypto options cap on 11 Bitcoin, Ether ETFs
stories.summary: Part of the approved rule changes allows institutions to trade the crypto ETFs as FLEX options, which offer customizable terms like non-standard strike prices and expiration dates.

stories.title: Banks push tokenized deposits as onchain cash race intensifies: Report
stories.summary: UK Finance said that tokenized deposits could play a “vital role” in a future multi-money system alongside other digital assets.

stories.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
stories.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

stories.title: BTC and gold divergence reflects split between retail and central banks: Analyst
stories.summary: 21Shares' macro chief looks at why Bitcoin has held relatively steady since the start of Middle East hostilities, while gold has slipped below $4,500 and key support levels.

stories.title: Scaramucci says BTC's 4-year cycle still in play, forecasts rise in Q4
stories.summary: Proponents of Bitcoin's four-year cycle theory say the price of BTC typically rises for three of the four years and declines in the final year.
